title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
